notes: Transitions to jab 2 as early as frame 9
Transitions to jab 3 as early as frame 9
Charge hold is frame 9. Front/low hit is the 11f startup hit.
Landing hit on frame 1. Autocancels on frame 1-4 and 50 onward
Startup is 6 from charge release. Can be charged for 50 addittional frames for more damage
Startup is 2 upon reaching a target. Endlag on hit is 48 if you don't land after hitting. Lands on 36 plus 5 frame landing animation on ground level. Stops at an edge with 44 frame endlag animation.
Ledge grabs enabled starting on frame 7.
Weak throw has rehit rate of 9 but will bounce off shields. Strong throw hits just once.
Invulnerable on frame 5-12. Landing hit on frame 1
Total frames assumes you end on the ground.
Can be charged for an additional 60 frames. 8f startup is only the front hit.
Intangible on frame 4-5. Counters on frame 5-26.

Reflects on frame 8-24, search box on frames 4-7. Invulnerable on frame 17-26 if you hit somebody or reflect something.While the move's reflector normally comes out on frame 8, it has a preemptive projectile detector starting on frame 4. If a projectile comes in contact with this detector, the move skips to frame 8 on the next frame, effectively cutting up to three frames of startup (and therefor reflecting on frame 5).
Total frames includes 13 frames of hitlag
